title: Henco Site Update
description:
** This request came in via team@clixsy.com and was forwarded to me by Chris **



Hi Chris,

This looks simple but this is a time intensive request since we're not talking about just a single page.

We will need a couple of days to complete this due to the following reasons:

1. The site has 4 silos (Vancouver, Ridgefield, Portland, Salem)
2. Historically they are only a plumbing company, most of the CTA across all pages were written only for plumbing.
3. If we look closely on the link that they sent, that's the page when we click the Plumbing menu 

which will require us to move some pieces around and also look at changing the URL from portland/services TO portland/plumbing/

This is also the case for the other silos when you click the plumbing menu, the URL is currently /services/ instead of /plumbing/

4. We also need to make sure that their latest addition of their electrical services are mentioned across the site.

Can you please inform the client about this?

Please let me know if you have any questions.

Thanks!

CC:

title: TCR Compliance Updates to all forms
description:
Seeking help w/ the following request for henco please.  
https://www.hencoplumbing.com/


1. Add / update the check box text for all the forms on the site please. The check box should have these:
By checking this box, I consent to receive marketing and promotional calls, and emails from or on behalf of Henco Plumbing & Cooling and its affiliates using an automated system or auto dialer for any purpose, including heating, cooling, electrical and plumbing. Consent is not a condition of purchase, and I can opt-out at any time.

2. Add a 2nd check box text below the 1st one: (unchecked by default) checkbox:
By checking this box, I agree to receive marketing and promotional text messages from Henco Plumbing & Cooling at the number provided, including offers and service updates. Message frequency varies. Message and data rates may apply. Reply STOP to opt out, HELP for help. Consent is not a condition of purchase. View our Privacy Policy and Terms.

**Remember, this is for ALL forms on each of the Seattle sites. Also link to the Privacy Policy and new SMS-Terms pages (see no4 below). The blue text above should be hyperlinked.

3. Add text to he Privacy Policy page, add a paragraph like this:

SMS Privacy

Mobile information will not be shared with third parties/affiliates for marketing or promotional purposes. Text messaging opt-in data and consent will not be shared with any third parties. 


4. Create a new page for each of the sites. This is the page that is linked to from the "Terms" link in the new SMS form disclaimer:

https://brand-name/sms-terms/

SMS/Messaging & Opt-Out
By opting in to messaging from Henco Plumbing & Cooling, you agree to receive appointment reminders, informational, marketing and other types of messages from us. Message frequency may vary and data rates from your provider may apply. You may opt out of all future messaging by replying STOP to any SMS message. You can also reply HELP for assistance, or  info@hencoplumbing.com. You may also opt out or request assistance by calling Henco Plumbing & Cooling at (503) 395-5902. When you opt out, you will receive no further messages from us.

Thanks!

title: Henco Main Menu UX and SEO
assignees: Andrei Pocol, John De Guzman, Predrag
description:
Hey guys! Henco is trying to improve their form fill rate and asked for some changes that won't really help. What will help is some changes to the homepage, mostly the main menu. My goal is to shorten the options currently in the menu so that we can add in "Coupons" and "About Us". 

I don't want to change anything that will affect SEO. Can you take a look at my proposed direction and advise?

  • Clean up the menu and make the Contact Us page more accessible. Currently not visible on mobile.
    • Move the locations options under "About Us"
    • Combine "Heating & Cooling" into one menu item
    • Add "Contact Us" as a main menu option
  • Make offers more prominent. Currently not visible on mobile.
    • Add "Coupons" to the main menu
    • "Spring into Savings!" just looks like a title. It's not apparent that it is clickable. Change Savings to link styling, light blue and underlined.

title: Homepage Copy Update
description:
Thank you! Can we also rewrite what's on our home page to reflect all services? Here's what i put together:


Dependable Plumbing, Heating, Cooling & Electrical Company in Vancouver, Portland, and Salem
Henco Services is the trusted name for plumbing, heating, cooling, and electrical solutions in Vancouver, Portland, Salem, WA, and throughout Greater Clark County. Call us today at 503-395-5902 to speak with one of our knowledgeable team members.
Your home is your sanctuary. You work hard to keep it clean, comfortable, and—most importantly—safe. So when something goes wrong with your plumbing, heating, cooling, or electrical systems, you need a team you can count on. That’s where Henco Services comes in.
Whether it’s a leaking pipe, a broken furnace, a failing A/C unit, or electrical issues, our expert technicians are ready to respond with fast, reliable service. Say goodbye to the stress of juggling multiple contractors—Henco has all your home service needs covered under one roof.
From Vancouver to Portland to Salem, our skilled professionals are standing by to help you tackle your home’s biggest challenges with confidence and ease.
Give us a call today to speak with a friendly member of our team. We’ll listen closely to your concerns and work with you to find the right solution—quickly and affordably.

title: GBP Lander, GBP & Site Phone Numbers - Client Communication Needed
description:
Hey , CC:  

As part of the footer updates we’re implementing for this client to align with SEO and NAP best practices, we’ve identified a few phone number discrepancies that need clarification. 

Best practice is to use a unique local number for each location (one listed on the GBP) and ensure it matches the appropriate areas across the website, citations, and GBP. 

Right now, we’re seeing: 
  • Website phone numbers not matching the GBPs
  • Unclear identification of the true local number per location
  • Another discrepancy on the GBPs, they are not using the location pages

Can you please reach out to the appropriate contact ASAP to:
  1. Inform them that we will proceed with the primary GBP numbers in order to avoid delaying the footer updates.
  2. Confirm the correct unique local number for each location
  3. Ensure Gasworks updates the GBPs and landing page links accordingly, as they are supposed to manage GBPs 
  
If the client can confirm the correct local numbers before the footer goes live, we’ll update them accordingly. If not, we will revise as soon as they are provided. That said, it’s important we get confirmation ASAP to ensure long-term NAP consistency. 

Thanks!

Here is all of the information below:

RIDGEFIELD

title: Henco Website Updates: HVAC Tune-ups
assignees: Chris Traynor, Justyna Acosta, Mary De Guzman
description:
Hi, opening this discussion task inline w/ the ticket Lester sent us today.
https://www.hencoplumbing.com/

He's asking for a some updates to be done on the site inline with their offers focused on promoting HVAC tune-ups.  I have added the verbatim below for reference.
Ticket title:  Henco Website Updates: HVAC Tune-ups

 
1. Add a sitewide top-bar banner (above the sticky header) promoting $99 HVAC tune-ups
  • Banner copy: “Get a $99 HVAC tune-up and keep your system running its best. Claim this deal!”

2. Update coupon lead capture behavior
  • Can we have the banner CTA and all “Get this Deal” buttons on the Coupons page open the same popup form instead of Scheduling Pro 2.0?

3. Auto-populate the selected offer in the form
  • The popup should pre-select a visible dropdown field with the coupon title that was clicked (for the banner click, it should pre-select “$99 HVAC Tune-Up”).
  • Alternatively, any method that displays the selected coupon in the form and submits it as part of the lead so the contact center can see which coupon was chosen.

Right now, “Get this Deal” launches the Scheduling Pro 2.0 widget which isn’t the right lead capture method for coupons. Please route those CTAs to the form popup instead.
For item #1: add a banner - We can have this added to the site already however we would still need help with what we can do for the rest of the other parts of the request he has. 

Please advise. 

Thanks much!
